decontamination_notes: Real fix from pallets/flask PR #5928, merged 2026-02-19, after model training cutoffs, so the specific fix is novel. Multi-file fix (app.py, ctx.py, helpers.py). Repo sliced at base commit (src/ + pyproject + LICENSE + README); BSD LICENSE preserved in repo/. Runs in per-task image vulcanbench/sandbox:flask-5928 (flask runtime deps preinstalled, flask package itself removed; tests run with PYTHONPATH=src). Hidden test asserts structure (all callbacks run, exception-group leaves), not message wording.
